title: podmanv2 pod create using podspecgen
body:
using the factory approach similar to container, we now create pods based on a pod spec generator.  wired up the podmanv2 pod create command, podcreatewithspec binding, simple binding test, and apiv2 endpoint.

also included some code refactoring as it introduced as easy circular import.

Signed-off-by: Brent Baude <bbaude@redhat.com>

comments.body: I'm getting really uncomfortable with the amount of code duplication going on here - we're rapidly approaching the point where bugfixes are going to have to go into both Podman and Podmanv2, and making sure that happens is going to be painful.
Which is why we need to get rid of podman 1.0 ASAP.  We need to start a branch for 1.0 and then make master branch the 2.0 branch.

> Which is why we need to get rid of podman 1.0 ASAP. We need to start a branch for 1.0 and then make master branch the 2.0 branch.

@rhatdan you couldnt be more right!
